[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001011 4
1 00000000 a
2 00000001 1
3 11011100 5
4 10000011 3
5 01011011 5
6 01000100 2
7 00010010 2

01 10 00010010 2 match 7
12 21 10000011 3 match 4
23 32 00000010 1
34 43 00011000 2
45 54 10000000 1
56 65 00000011 2
67 76 01000000 1
70 07 00000000 a match 1

02 20 00000010 1
13 31 01010010 3
24 42 10000000 1
35 53 00000010 1
46 64 00011000 2
57 75 00000000 a match 1

71 17 01000000 1

36 63 01011010 4
47 74 00000000 a match 1
50 05 00000010 1
61 16 01010011 4
72 27 00000000 a match 1

15 51 10000011 3 match 4
26 62 00000011 2
37 73 01000000 1
